primary_school_net_attendance_total.label: Primary school net attendance rate
primary_school_net_attendance_total.dataSource: Kenya Population and Housing Census / SIHBS education extract

net_attendance_total.label: Secondary school net attendance rate
net_attendance_total.dataSource: Kenya Population and Housing Census / SIHBS education extract

health_fac_per_10k_pop.label: Health facilities per 10,000 population
health_fac_per_10k_pop.dataSource: Government of Kenya / WHO health facility registry

hospitals_per_100k_pop.label: Hospitals per 100,000 population
hospitals_per_100k_pop.dataSource: Government of Kenya / WHO health facility registry

pop_frac_3plus.label: Fraction of population in IPC (Integrated Food Security Phase Classification) Phase 3 or higher
pop_frac_3plus.dataSource: Integrated Food Security Phase Classification (IPC) via HDX HAPI

rs_fapar.label: Fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetically Active Radiation

percent_highest_level_secondary_educatio.label: Secondary school completion rate (as highest level of education)

annual_cmb_mean.label: Average annual CMB (Cost of Minimum Expenditure Basket) cost
annual_cmb_mean.dataSource: CLiMIS South Sudan- South Sudan National Bureau of Statistics and Ministry of Agriculture and Food Security

count_conflict_events_per_100k.label: Count of Conflict Events per 100,000 Population
